semantic.role: Defines pattern-based extraction rules for code structure analysis in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defines export patterns for functions, structs, and variables
Defines usage patterns for function calls, field access, and pointer field access
outOfScope: Patterns for macros, preprocessor directives beyond #include
Language-specific syntax not covered by patterns

English.purpose: This document serves as a configuration file for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining pattern rules to extract and represent code structures from source files. It enables the system to identify imports, exports (functions, structs, variables), and usages (calls, fields) to build a code mirror.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine system who need to customize code extraction rules. It is a technical specification for pattern matching in code analysis.
key_takeaways: Provides import detection pattern for include directives
Defines export patterns for three code element types: functions, structs, variables
Defines usage patterns for call, field, and pointer field access
Enables automatic mapping of code structure in the mirror system

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是ArchSpine镜像系统的配置文件，定义了从源文件中提取和表示代码结构的模式规则。它使系统能够识别导入、导出（函数、结构体、变量）以及用法（调用、字段访问），从而构建代码镜像。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向ArchSpine系统的开发者和维护者，用于定制代码提取规则。这是一份关于代码分析模式匹配的技术规范。
key_takeaways: 提供了#include指令的导入检测模式
定义了三种代码元素类型的导出模式：函数、结构体、变量
定义了调用、字段访问和指针字段访问的用法模式
支持在镜像系统中自动映射代码结构
